cleavage agent: Pepsin and trypsin were obtained from Sigma-Aldrich
fractionation method: purified 11 enzymatic protein hydrolysates (EPHs) from A. dichotoma larvae using ultrafiltration (UF)
instrument: subsequent separation and identification of anti-obesity peptides from the C-4 fraction were performed by reversed-phase-HPLC and nanoUPLC Orbitrap Fusion Lumos MS
